summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trails Test Case
description: This test case validates that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: Validate compliance with FDA Part 11 and ISO 9001 regulations regarding patient data encryption and audit trail storage.
prerequisites: System is configured to encrypt patient data
Audit trail storage mechanism is enabled

test_steps.description: Enter a new patient record with sensitive information
Verify that the entered patient data is encrypted using AES-256
Perform an action that triggers a database change (e.g. update patient record)
Verify that an audit trail is created for the database change

expected_result: The system encrypts patient data using AES-256 and stores audit trails for every database change.
acceptance_criteria: Patient data is encrypted using AES-256
Audit trails are stored for every database change
